{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 3, "R1.3": 4, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.2": "Identifies a major inconsistency (game count) but doesn't fully repair it.", "R1.3": "Flags several instances where the evidence (performance on games) doesn't support the claim (human-level across all 12).", "RX.1": "Does not differentiate uncertainty levels for different claims.", "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested scope but misses some details about excluded games.", "RX.4": "No regressions identified; the analysis is harm-free.", "RX.5": "Lacks traceability for proposed changes and justifications."},

rationale.R1.2: Identifies a major inconsistency (game count) but doesn't fully repair it.
rationale.R1.3: Flags several instances where the evidence (performance on games) doesn't support the claim (human-level across all 12).
rationale.RX.1: Does not differentiate uncertainty levels for different claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested scope but misses some details about excluded games.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the analysis is harm-free.
rationale.RX.5: Lacks traceability for proposed changes and justifications.
